message:
fix(ci): Windows path handling in module resolver and node:path shim

- Canonicalize resolved module paths to remove ./.. segments and
  normalize backslashes to forward slashes for QuickJS
- Add __pi_is_abs() helper for Windows drive letter detection (D:/)
- path.join() now calls normalize() to collapse . and .. segments
- path.resolve() detects Windows absolute paths and calls normalize()
- path.normalize() preserves Windows drive letter prefix
- path.isAbsolute() handles Windows drive letters
- path.dirname() returns "." for bare filenames, preserves D:/ root

Fixes Windows CI failures where readFileSync couldn't find extension
assets due to un-normalized ./ segments in module paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
